title: ISI Project linked Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) Project linked Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ISI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ISI Project linked Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have M.Sc. in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Sciences/Geological Sciences along with CSIR-UGC NET (including LS/Ph.D) or GATE qualification are eligible to apply for these Project linked Junior Research Fellow vacancies. The online application process for ISI Project linked Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years as on 31 May 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: First class (or CGPA of 6.0 and above at scale of 10) in M.Sc. in Geology/Applied Geology/Earth Sciences/Geological Sciences. Qualified CSIR-UGC NET (including LS/Ph.D) or GATE examination.

selection_process: Written test (if required) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ISI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ISI Project linked Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project linked Junior Research Fellow post at the Indian Statistical Institute is 31 May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a First Class M.Sc. degree in Geology, Applied Geology, Earth Sciences, or Geological Sciences. Additionally, they need to have qualified the CSIR-UGC NET (including LS/Ph.D) or GATE examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project linked Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years as of 31 May 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project linked Junior Research Fellow at the Indian Statistical Institute.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of the Indian Statistical Institute.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test (if deemed necessary), followed by an interview and document verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the tenure of the appointment?
faq.answer: The tenure for the Project linked Junior Research Fellow position is up to 31 March 2027.
